title: Danny Russell (rugby league, born 1969)
description: Former Scotland international rugby league footballer
extract: Danny Russell (born 24 December 1969) is a former rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at representative level for Scotland, playing at the 2000 Rugby League World Cup, and at club level for Manly-Warringah Sea Eagles, Carlisle and Huddersfield, as a hooker.
